description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic in rudimentary handwriting (distinctive qofs) dealing with various financial matters. Refers to someone staying in a certain state for 5 months; the rent of a house; and Ḥusayn Ibn Zaffān. Difficult Arabic script on verso, possibly an address. Needs further examination.
description_he: קטע מכתב ביהודית-ערבית בכתב יד גס; עוסק בענייני כספים, שכירות בית וחסין בן זפאן; דרוש בדיקה נוספת
